title: AquaUI
body:
# AQUA UI
A simple aquatic texture pack for 1.20 and 1.21

FEATURES:
Changes the in game UI and widgets to a blue theme
brings back the 1.13 panorama.
Changes the defult dirt background to feature coral 
This texture pack was made for the pirates craft modpack
 


 

### Sponsored By kinetic hosting
![kinetic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7ef17237df790827afcb3efe99c13f33cb4504c_0.webp)(https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=185)
